error_signature: cannot see the model in the dropdown list
title: Llama 3.2 model not appearing in n8n dropdown
symptom: After setting up the Llama 3.2 model in Docker, it does not appear in the n8n model dropdown despite a successful connection test.
applies_when: Configured with base URL for the model
not_this_if: Using a different model or integration
root_cause: The issue arises because the Llama 3.2 model requires a specific API endpoint format that differs from the default Ollama chat model. Using the incorrect model type in n8n prevents it from recognizing the model.
fix_steps: Change the model type in n8n to OpenAI chat model shape
Save the changes and refresh the n8n interface
agent_instruction: Switch to the OpenAI chat model shape and update the credentials URL accordingly.
